'''Arbran V''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Arbran]]. It was the second of two [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giants]] in the [[Arbran system]],<ref name="Arbra Part 1" /> located in the [[Bon'nyuw-Luq sector/Legends|Bon'nyuw-Luq sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The planet was orbited by eleven [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="Arbra Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arbran V was mentioned in "Hole in the Ground," the first article in ''[[Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm]]'', a series of ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] articles written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. The article was published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[June 5]], [[2003]].<ref name="Arbra Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' later placed the Arbran [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Arbran V, in grid square N-17.<ref name="TEA" />
